title: The Dog In The Manger
content:
A Cow sought a mouthful of hay;
    But a Dog in the manger there lay,
    And he snapped out "how now?"
    When most mildly, the Cow
    Adventured a morsel to pray.

    Don't Be Selfish
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Dog In The Manger"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
